dental.subject: Quick website audit for {business_name}
dental.body:
Hi there,

I ran a quick technical audit of {business_name}'s website ({website_url}) and found a few issues:

{website_issues}

I'm a solo AI & automation engineer who redesigns dental websites to make them secure, mobile-friendly, and optimized for new patients.

See a live example of my work:
{promo_url}

Are you open to a quick 5-minute call this week to discuss how to fix these?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
AI & Automation Engineer
